job_title: Software Development Engineer , Alexa Device Platform Team
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Software Design, Software Architecture, Programming Languages, System Performance Profiling
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Software Design:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Programming Languages:1.0, System Performance Profiling:0.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience, 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience, Experience programming with at least one software programming language
preferred_quals: 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience, Bachelor's degree in computer science or equivalent
core_responsibilities: Investigate, prototype and deliver new and innovative system solutions, Responsible for key domain areas like security, graphics, video and storage, Work cross function with vendors, OS, application teams and system architecture team for system resource and workloads for echo products, Profile, Analyze and Optimize system level performance for example kernel scheduler tuning, use/create profiling and trace tools to debug critical issues for Beta and production software, Participate in design reviews, API development, and documentation, Demonstrate expertise in building AI bots and integrate AI tools into the standard workflow to improve team’s support load and test automation
job_summary: Amazon is a leading consumer electronics company, and they are seeking a Senior Embedded Software Engineer to join their Devices team. The role involves designing, architecting, and implementing innovative system solutions for Amazon Echo products.
